##RRUFFID=R110040
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Co(Se^4+^O_3_)·2H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Musonoi mine extension, Kolwezi, Katanga, Congo
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Pale pink to purple grains scattered through a matrix of chalcomenite, demesmaekerite, and derriksite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
